name: nopollops-drasi-demo
description: Audience interaction demo for Drasi continuous queries on AKS

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @nopollops/api & npm run dev --workspace @nopollops/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @nopollops/api && npm run build --workspace @nopollops/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @nopollops/api && npm run lint --workspace @nopollops/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @nopollops/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @nopollops/web
